description: This file defines API routes for managing tags in the NoteMaster Pro application. It handles CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations for tags, including endpoints to create, list, update, and delete tags, with appropriate dependencies, data validation, and error handling.

methods.name: create_tag( tag_data: schemas.TagCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Creates a new tag for the authenticated user after verifying the name is unique.

methods.name: list_tags( db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Retrieves all tags associated with the authenticated user.

methods.name: update_tag( tag_id: uuid.UUID, tag_data: schemas.TagUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Updates the specified tag with new data provided, after verifying existence.

methods.name: delete_tag( tag_id: uuid.UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Deletes a specified tag if it exists and belongs to the current user.

ctags.name: create_tag
ctags.signature: ( tag_data: schemas.TagCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: delete_tag
ctags.signature: ( tag_id: uuid.UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: list_tags
ctags.signature: ( db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: update_tag
ctags.signature: ( tag_id: uuid.UUID, tag_data: schemas.TagUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
